narrative:
Jackson Twp township has 1,509 registered voters, with 58.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.9%, a clear Democratic lean of 6.1 percentage points.
